recorddelta.title: SETH Project raises $20,000 at annual soiree for ALS awareness, plans to start new grant program

wvnews.title: Joseph Ray Montgomery
wvnews.description: Joseph Ray Montgomery, 71, of Pennsboro, WV, departed this life Friday, April 24, 2026, at Camden Clark Medical Center in Parkersburg, WV, after courageously battling cancer for the last couple of years.

wvnews.title: Fast-moving storms batter the Midwest, flooding streets and stranding commuters
wvnews.description: Authorities say fast-moving storms pummeled parts of the Midwest with hail, strong wind and heavy rain, flooding streets and leading to stranded commuters who needed to be rescued from their vehicles. More storms are on the way through Monday night.…

wvnews.title: Russian drone attack wounds 14 while Ukrainian drones kill 2 in Russia-held area
wvnews.description: Authorities in Ukraine say a Russian drone attack on Ukraine’s southern city of Odesa has wounded 14 people including two children. Officials said Monday that the drones hit residential neighborhoods and civilian infrastructure. A Russian official said that a Ukrainian…
